---
title: "Lake Profiles - SpringBloom2021"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
---

```{r}
rm(list = ls())
############################################################
# 0) INITIAL SETUP FOR CLEAN SCRIPT EXECUTION
# - Loads required packages
# - Installs missing ones automatically
# - Sets working directory and paths
# - Ensures reproducibility
############################################################

# ---- 0.1 Package management ----
required_packages <- c(
  "tidyverse",   # dplyr, ggplot2, tidyr, readr, stringr
  "lubridate",   # date handling
  "readxl",      # Excel import
  "scales",      # axis formatting
  "metR"         # contour labeling
)

# Install missing packages
installed <- rownames(installed.packages())
for (pkg in required_packages) {
  if (!pkg %in% installed) {
    install.packages(pkg, dependencies = TRUE)
  }
}

# Load libraries
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidyverse)
  library(lubridate)
  library(readxl)
  library(scales)
  library(metR)
})

# ---- 0.2 Reproducibility ----
set.seed(123)  # ensures reproducibility where randomness might occur

# ---- 0.3 Set working directory ----
# IMPORTANT: adjust this path to your system
data_dir <- "/SynologyDrive/PhD/Projects/SpringBloom2021/DataAnalysis_SpringBloom2021/Supplementary/LakeProfiles/LongTermLakeProfiles/"
out_dir  <- data_dir

setwd(data_dir)

# ---- 0.4 Global options ----
options(stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Ensure consistent date labels (avoid German locale issues)
Sys.setlocale("LC_TIME", "C")

# ---- 0.5 Time windows (used throughout script) ----
LONG_START  <- as.Date("2009-01-01")
LONG_END    <- as.Date("2024-09-24")

PANEL_START <- as.Date("2012-01-01")
PANEL_END   <- as.Date("2021-12-31")

############################################################
# 1) LOAD INPUT DATASETS
# - Reads all required input files
# - Performs minimal sanity checks
############################################################

# ---- 1.1 File paths ----
env_file  <- file.path(data_dir, "Data/ENV_VAR_FULL.csv")
fc_file   <- file.path(data_dir, "Data/FC_FULL.csv")
phos_file <- file.path(data_dir, "Data/Data_Phosphate.xlsx")

# ---- 1.2 Check that files exist ----
if (!file.exists(env_file))  stop("Missing file: ENV_VAR_FULL.csv")
if (!file.exists(fc_file))   stop("Missing file: FC_FULL.csv")
if (!file.exists(phos_file)) stop("Missing file: Data_Phosphate.xlsx")

# ---- 1.3 Load data ----
env_raw  <- readr::read_csv(env_file, show_col_types = FALSE)
fc_data  <- readr::read_csv(fc_file, show_col_types = FALSE)
phos_raw <- readxl::read_excel(phos_file)

# ---- 1.4 Quick sanity check ----
cat("ENV_VAR rows:", nrow(env_raw), "\n")
cat("FC rows:", nrow(fc_data), "\n")
cat("Phosphate rows:", nrow(phos_raw), "\n")

# ---- 1.5 Optional: preview structure ----
str(env_raw)
str(fc_data)
str(phos_raw)
```

```{r}
############################################################
# Reproduce yearly oxygen panel plot with 6 mg/L isoline
#
# ASSUMPTION:
# - You have already run the setup/data-loading block
# - Therefore `env_raw` already exists in memory
#
# OUTPUT:
# - Plot object: Long_Term_Oxygen_Profiles
# - Saved file: Long_Term_Oxygen_Profiles.pdf
############################################################

# -------------------------
# 1) Helper functions needed for this plot
# -------------------------

# Robust numeric conversion
as_num <- function(x) {
  readr::parse_number(as.character(x), locale = readr::locale(decimal_mark = ","))
}

# Interpolate along depth for each sampling date
interp_depth <- function(df, value_col, depth_max = 120, depth_step = 1) {
  value_col <- rlang::ensym(value_col)
  
  df %>%
    dplyr::group_by(date) %>%
    dplyr::group_modify(~ {
      sub <- .x %>%
        dplyr::transmute(depth = depth, value = !!value_col) %>%
        dplyr::filter(!is.na(depth), !is.na(value)) %>%
        dplyr::arrange(depth)
      
      if (nrow(sub) < 2) {
        return(tibble::tibble(
          depth = numeric(0),
          !!value_col := numeric(0)
        ))
      }
      
      depth_out <- seq(0, depth_max, by = depth_step)
      
      tibble::tibble(
        depth = depth_out,
        !!value_col := approx(
          x = sub$depth,
          y = sub$value,
          xout = depth_out,
          rule = 2
        )$y
      )
    }) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup()
}

# Interpolate through time to daily values for each depth
interp_time_daily <- function(df, value_col, start_date, end_date) {
  value_col <- rlang::ensym(value_col)
  
  df %>%
    dplyr::filter(date >= start_date, date <= end_date) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(depth) %>%
    dplyr::group_modify(~ {
      base <- .x %>%
        dplyr::transmute(date = date, value = !!value_col) %>%
        tidyr::complete(date = seq(start_date, end_date, by = "day")) %>%
        dplyr::arrange(date)
      
      good <- !is.na(base$value)
      
      if (sum(good) >= 2) {
        base$value <- approx(
          x = as.numeric(base$date[good]),
          y = base$value[good],
          xout = as.numeric(base$date),
          rule = 2
        )$y
      }
      
      tibble::tibble(
        date  = base$date,
        depth = unique(.x$depth)[1],
        !!value_col := base$value
      )
    }) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup()
}

# -------------------------
# 2) Define time window
# -------------------------
PANEL_START <- as.Date("2012-01-01")
PANEL_END   <- as.Date("2021-12-31")

# -------------------------
# 3) Clean oxygen data from env_raw
# -------------------------
env <- env_raw %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    date  = as.Date(Day, format = "%m/%d/%Y"),
    depth = as_num(Depth)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(date), !is.na(depth))

# -------------------------
# 4) Depth interpolation for oxygen
# -------------------------
oxy_depth <- interp_depth(env, Oxygen, depth_max = 120, depth_step = 1)

# -------------------------
# 5) Daily interpolation for yearly panels
# -------------------------
oxy_panel <- interp_time_daily(oxy_depth, Oxygen, PANEL_START, PANEL_END) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Year = lubridate::year(date))

# -------------------------
# 6) Build colour scale exactly as in original script
# -------------------------
oxygen_palette_long <- c(
  "#deebf7", "#c6dbef", "#9ecae1",
  "#6baed6", "#2171b5", "#08519c",
  "#67000d", "#a50f15", "#cb181d", "#ef3b2c"
)

omin <- floor(min(oxy_panel$Oxygen, na.rm = TRUE) * 2) / 2
omax <- ceiling(max(oxy_panel$Oxygen, na.rm = TRUE) * 2) / 2
obreaks <- seq(omin, omax, by = 2.5)

oxygen_palette_cont <- colorRampPalette(oxygen_palette_long)(256)

# -------------------------
# 7) Yearly summary labels at 120 m
# -------------------------
oxy_stats_120m <- oxy_panel %>%
  dplyr::filter(depth == 120) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Year) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    max120  = max(Oxygen, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean120 = mean(Oxygen, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    label = sprintf("120 m\nmax = %.1f mg/L\nmean = %.1f mg/L", max120, mean120),
    x = as.Date(paste0(Year, "-07-01")),
    y = 110
  )

# -------------------------
# 8) Common panel theme
# -------------------------
theme_panel <- ggplot2::theme_minimal() +
  ggplot2::theme(
    axis.text.x      = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    strip.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "grey90", color = NA),
    strip.text       = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position  = "right"
  )

# -------------------------
# 9) Build final plot
# -------------------------
Long_Term_Oxygen_Profiles <- ggplot2::ggplot(oxy_panel, ggplot2::aes(x = date, y = depth)) +
  ggplot2::geom_raster(ggplot2::aes(fill = Oxygen)) +
  ggplot2::geom_contour(
    ggplot2::aes(z = Oxygen),
    binwidth  = 0.5,
    colour    = "white",
    alpha     = 0.4,
    linewidth = 0.2
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_contour(
    ggplot2::aes(z = Oxygen),
    breaks    = 6,
    colour    = "black",
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_fill_gradientn(
    colours = oxygen_palette_cont,
    limits  = c(omin, omax),
    breaks  = obreaks,
    labels  = scales::number_format(accuracy = 0.5, decimal.mark = "."),
    name    = "Oxygen (mg/L)"
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_y_reverse(expand = c(0, 0), breaks = seq(0, 120, 30)) +
  ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept = c(2, 8), color = "gray80") +
  ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ Year, ncol = 5, scales = "free_x") +
  ggplot2::scale_x_date(
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    date_labels = "%b",
    expand      = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_text(
    data = oxy_stats_120m,
    ggplot2::aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    hjust = 0,
    vjust = 1,
    size = 3
  ) +
  theme_panel +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Oxygen Profiles by Year (2012–2021)",
    x     = "Month",
    y     = "Depth (m)"
  )

# -------------------------
# 10) Show plot
# -------------------------
Long_Term_Oxygen_Profiles

# -------------------------
# 11) Save plot with new filename
# -------------------------
ggplot2::ggsave(
  filename = file.path(out_dir, "Long_Term_Oxygen_Profiles.png"),
  plot     = Long_Term_Oxygen_Profiles,
  width    = 13,
  height   = 12,
  units    = "in",
  device   = "png"
)
```
```{r}
############################################################
# FINAL ORTHOPHOSPHATE YEARLY PANEL PLOT
# - restricted strictly to 0-120 m
# - depth + time interpolation
# - reduced background isolines
# - 10 isoline: thin grey
# - 60 isoline: thicker black
# - greener palette
# - 120 m yearly max and mean labels
#
# ASSUMPTION:
# - phos_raw already exists in memory
# - out_dir already exists
############################################################

# -------------------------
# 1) Depth interpolation per date
# strictly restricted to 0-120 m
# -------------------------
interp_depth_phos <- function(df, depth_max = 120, depth_step = 1) {
  df %>%
    dplyr::group_by(date) %>%
    dplyr::group_modify(~ {
      sub <- .x %>%
        dplyr::select(depth, phos) %>%
        dplyr::filter(!is.na(depth), !is.na(phos), depth >= 0, depth <= depth_max) %>%
        dplyr::group_by(depth) %>%
        dplyr::summarise(phos = mean(phos), .groups = "drop") %>%
        dplyr::arrange(depth)

      if (nrow(sub) < 2) {
        return(tibble::tibble(depth = numeric(0), phos = numeric(0)))
      }

      depth_out <- seq(0, depth_max, by = depth_step)

      tibble::tibble(
        depth = depth_out,
        phos = stats::approx(
          x = sub$depth,
          y = sub$phos,
          xout = depth_out,
          rule = 2
        )$y
      )
    }) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup()
}

# -------------------------
# 2) Time interpolation per depth
# -------------------------
interp_time_daily <- function(df, value_col, start_date, end_date) {
  value_col <- rlang::ensym(value_col)

  df %>%
    dplyr::filter(date >= start_date, date <= end_date) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(depth) %>%
    dplyr::group_modify(~ {
      base <- .x %>%
        dplyr::transmute(date = as.Date(date), value = !!value_col) %>%
        tidyr::complete(date = seq(start_date, end_date, by = "day")) %>%
        dplyr::arrange(date)

      good <- !is.na(base$value)

      if (sum(good) >= 2) {
        base$value <- stats::approx(
          x = as.numeric(base$date[good]),
          y = base$value[good],
          xout = as.numeric(base$date),
          rule = 2
        )$y
      }

      tibble::tibble(
        date  = base$date,
        depth = unique(.x$depth)[1],
        !!value_col := base$value
      )
    }) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup()
}

# -------------------------
# 3) Time window
# -------------------------
PANEL_START <- as.Date("2012-01-01")
PANEL_END   <- as.Date("2021-12-31")

# -------------------------
# 4) Clean input data
# strictly keep 0-120 m only
# -------------------------
phos_data <- phos_raw %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    date  = as.Date(date),
    depth = as.numeric(depth),
    phos  = as.numeric(phos)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(date), !is.na(depth), !is.na(phos), depth >= 0, depth <= 120)

# -------------------------
# 5) Depth interpolation
# -------------------------
phos_interp <- interp_depth_phos(phos_data, depth_max = 120, depth_step = 1) %>%
  dplyr::filter(depth <= 120)

# -------------------------
# 6) Time interpolation
# -------------------------
phos_panel <- interp_time_daily(phos_interp, phos, PANEL_START, PANEL_END) %>%
  dplyr::filter(depth <= 120) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Year = lubridate::year(date))

# -------------------------
# 7) 120 m yearly summary labels
# bottom-aligned
# -------------------------
phos_stats_120m <- phos_panel %>%
  dplyr::filter(depth == 120) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Year) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    max120  = max(phos, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean120 = mean(phos, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    label = sprintf("120 m\nmax = %.1f µg/L\nmean = %.1f µg/L", max120, mean120),
    x = as.Date(paste0(Year, "-07-01")),
    y = 120
  )

# -------------------------
# 8) Green palette
# less white, darker highs
# -------------------------
phos_limits <- c(0, 200)
phos_breaks <- c(0, 50, 100, 150, 200)

phos_green_base <- c(
  "#eef7ee",
  "#d9f0d3",
  "#b8e3b2",
  "#8fd08a",
  "#5cb85c",
  "#2f8f46",
  "#0f6b2a",
  "#00441b"
)

phos_palette_cont <- grDevices::colorRampPalette(phos_green_base)(256)

# -------------------------
# 9) Theme matching oxygen plot
# -------------------------
theme_panel <- ggplot2::theme_minimal() +
  ggplot2::theme(
    axis.text.x      = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    strip.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "grey90", color = NA),
    strip.text       = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position  = "right"
  )

# -------------------------
# 10) Final plot
# -------------------------
Long_Term_Orthophosphate_Profiles <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  phos_panel,
  ggplot2::aes(x = date, y = depth)
) +
  ggplot2::geom_tile(
    ggplot2::aes(fill = phos),
    width = 1,
    height = 1
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_contour(
    ggplot2::aes(z = phos),
    binwidth  = 5,
    colour    = "white",
    alpha     = 0.15,
    linewidth = 0.15
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_contour(
    ggplot2::aes(z = phos),
    breaks    = 10,
    colour    = "grey40",
    linewidth = 0.25
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_contour(
    ggplot2::aes(z = phos),
    breaks    = 60,
    colour    = "black",
    linewidth = 0.7
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_fill_gradientn(
    colours = phos_palette_cont,
    limits  = phos_limits,
    breaks  = phos_breaks,
    labels  = scales::number_format(accuracy = 1),
    name    = expression("Orthophosphate ["*mu*"g P L"^{-1}*"]")
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_y_reverse(
    limits = c(120, 0),
    breaks = seq(0, 120, 30),
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept = c(2, 8), color = "gray80") +
  ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ Year, ncol = 5, scales = "free_x") +
  ggplot2::scale_x_date(
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    date_labels = "%b",
    expand      = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_text(
    data = phos_stats_120m,
    ggplot2::aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    hjust = 0,
    vjust = 0,
    size = 3
  ) +
  theme_panel +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Orthophosphate Profiles by Year (2012–2021)",
    x     = "Month",
    y     = "Depth (m)"
  )

# -------------------------
# 11) Show plot
# -------------------------
Long_Term_Orthophosphate_Profiles

# -------------------------
# 12) Save plot
# -------------------------
ggplot2::ggsave(
  filename = file.path(out_dir, "Long_Term_Orthophosphate_Profiles.png"),
  plot     = Long_Term_Orthophosphate_Profiles,
  width    = 13,
  height   = 12,
  units    = "in",
  device = png
)
```
